channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LUDOC-539] Lustre Wiki: Review Introductory Pages
item.description:
The following pages are all over 3 years old.  These are being reviewed as part of the efforts of the Lustre Documentation Working Group.  The main intent of this bug is to evaluate if these pages require:

  • Reorganization
  • Removal due to staleness
  • Extension due to missing material
  • Correction to fix incorrect or stale material

The author is expected to annotate this work item with the changes expected.  They may or may not make those changes as part of this work item.  If they choose to not make those changes, they are expected to create a new work item where the identified, explicit improvements can be made by another individual within the LUDOC stream.  If they do choose to make those changes, please clarify such in the comment section.

The full list of pages include:


Beginner Pages:

[Getting Started|https://wiki.lustre.org/Getting_Started]‏‎ (11:56, 6 July 2015)

[Download|https://wiki.lustre.org/Download]‏‎ (08:47, 10 August 2016)

[Lustre with ZFS Install|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_with_ZFS_Install]‏‎ (09:12, 20 September 2018)

[Configuring the Lustre File System|https://wiki.lustre.org/Configuring_the_Lustre_File_System]‏‎ (07:27, 25 August 2016)

[Lustre System Configuration Utilities|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_System_Configuration_Utilities]‏‎ (07:21, 13 October 2016)

[Preparing to Install Lustre|https://wiki.lustre.org/Preparing_to_Install_Lustre]‏‎ (07:43, 2 November 2016)

[Starting and Stopping Lustre Services|https://wiki.lustre.org/Starting_and_Stopping_Lustre_Services]‏‎ (01:31, 16 August 2017)

[Lustre Management Service (MGS)|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Management_Service_(MGS)]‏‎ (22:44, 30 August 2017)

[Lustre Clients Overview|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Clients_Overview]‏‎ (22:45, 30 August 2017)

[Lustre Client Requirements Guidelines|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Client_Requirements_Guidelines]‏‎ (22:46, 30 August 2017)

[Operating System Configuration Guidelines For Lustre|https://wiki.lustre.org/Operating_System_Configuration_Guidelines_For_Lustre]‏‎ (21:39, 7 September 2017)

[Creating the Lustre Management Service (MGS)|https://wiki.lustre.org/Creating_the_Lustre_Management_Service_(MGS)]‏‎ (22:15, 10 September 2017)

[Creating the Lustre Metadata Service (MDS)|https://wiki.lustre.org/Creating_the_Lustre_Metadata_Service_(MDS)]‏‎ (22:17, 10 September 2017)

[Lustre Object Storage Service (OSS)|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Object_Storage_Service_(OSS)]‏‎ (21:39, 8 November 2017)

[Lustre Metadata Service (MDS)|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Metadata_Service_(MDS)]‏‎ (21:40, 8 November 2017)

[Creating Lustre Object Storage Services (OSS)|https://wiki.lustre.org/Creating_Lustre_Object_Storage_Services_(OSS)]‏‎ (13:24, 25 May 2018)

[Configuring Lustre File Striping|https://wiki.lustre.org/Configuring_Lustre_File_Striping]‏‎ (13:28, 6 February 2019)

[Upgrading to a New Version of Lustre|https://wiki.lustre.org/Upgrading_to_a_New_Version_of_Lustre]‏‎ (14:06, 1 April 2019)

[Lustre Server Requirements Guidelines|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Server_Requirements_Guidelines]‏‎ (19:47, 4 October 2019)

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
[Lustre 101|https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_101]‏‎ (18:09, 18 April 2016)

This page has been updated with copies of some material I recovered from Wayback Machine along with a few presentations from the old Lustre Ecosystem conferences.  I think this is the final form for the wiki page so I am removing it from the list of pages to review.
elliswilson , that sounds great. I have not been able to attend for sometime, so this is great relief tbh.
Hi Jason – I've assigned this to Rick for the time being, but if you'd like to help out some more please don't hesitate to speak up!

elliswilson , this took way too much time for such a simple ask. My bad. For Monday, I have gone through each page, I have at least a disposition that I can help speak towards. Additionally, I'd like to take "Getting Started" and compare to other "major open source projects" and perhaps get an idea of "what everyone else is doing". For now, my list

 

Page Name Address Evaluation Notes
Getting Started https://wiki.lustre.org/Getting_Started Extension due to missing material No content exists.
Lustre 101 https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_101 Correction to fix incorrect or stale material External linked content forbidden
Download https://wiki.lustre.org/Download Correction to fix incorrect or stale material May simply want to redirect the page to official source
Lustre with ZFS Install https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_with_ZFS_Install Correction to fix incorrect or stale material Per discussion, generic and remove puppet
Configuring the Lustre File System https://wiki.lustre.org/Configuring_the_Lustre_File_System Correction to fix incorrect or stale material Broken link at top, content formatting issues. 
Lustre System Configuration Utilities https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_System_Configuration_Utilities Correction to fix incorrect or stale material Broken links, there has to be more config utils than this
Preparing to Install Lustre https://wiki.lustre.org/Preparing_to_Install_Lustre Extension due to missing material This entire page just needs a refresh for modern OS flavors
Starting and Stopping Lustre Services https://wiki.lustre.org/Starting_and_Stopping_Lustre_Services Removal due to staleness This content seems better served in a more general page
Lustre Management Service (MGS) https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Management_Service_(MGS) Correction to fix incorrect or stale material Pretty good overall...still holds up imho
Lustre Clients Overview https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Clients_Overview Removal due to staleness I more comprehensive 'Lustre Client' chapter?
Lustre Client Requirements Guidelines https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Client_Requirements_Guidelines Removal due to staleness Intention of this page belongs in a broader "chapter" (see above)
Operating System Configuration Guidelines For Lustre https://wiki.lustre.org/Operating_System_Configuration_Guidelines_For_Lustre Removal due to staleness Seems unwarranted. This content would be better served distributed across a manual or other parts of wiki
Creating the Lustre Management Service (MGS) https://wiki.lustre.org/Creating_the_Lustre_Management_Service_(MGS) Reorganization Suggest removing. 
Creating the Lustre Metadata Service (MDS) https://wiki.lustre.org/Creating_the_Lustre_Metadata_Service_(MDS) Reorganization Above
Lustre Object Storage Service (OSS) https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Object_Storage_Service_(OSS) Correction to fix incorrect or stale material This page seems more ideal to what above MGS|Client ought to be
Lustre Metadata Service (MDS) https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Metadata_Service_(MDS) Correction to fix incorrect or stale material This page seems more ideal to what above MGS|Client ought to be
Creating Lustre Object Storage Services (OSS) https://wiki.lustre.org/Creating_Lustre_Object_Storage_Services_(OSS) Reorganization This belongs more in general OSS page above
Configuring Lustre File Striping https://wiki.lustre.org/Configuring_Lustre_File_Striping Extension due to missing material Broken links, and need to update to align with current version
Upgrading to a New Version of Lustre https://wiki.lustre.org/Upgrading_to_a_New_Version_of_Lustre Removal due to staleness Old...very old, deprecated
Lustre Server Requirements Guidelines https://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Server_Requirements_Guidelines Removal due to staleness Old, not relevant any longer. Too verbose

Starting a small xlsx to track these pages and their disposition for now:

https://datadirectnetworks-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/g/personal/jhuselton_ddn_com/Ef3cwkYuxTZAuj2CLD9XtpUBwZ77jzBgC5m9yO-Bn72q7Q?e=rYOYFf

[Getting Started|https://wiki.lustre.org/Getting_Started:] No content. Decision needed weather to develop content for this, or send to trash. I sync'd with cfaber mentioned on page, and he had a really great idea I can make.

Honestly for a single node, "play with the file system" type setup, "llmount.sh" as part of the /usr/lib64/lustre/tests scripts works great to do an instant setup

 You can just walk through the steps in that script and generate a quick start guide pretty fast

 elliswilson , I'll try and make the next meeting, but I have a conflict for a POC expected to be completed this month. ‏‎
